last_sleep_summary: Sleep #8 — v0.6 control panel built end-to-end via 3 autonomous goal-skill cycles, plus v0.5.x docs/test/context-gate work. sleep-state: created v0.6.0 planning version; 6 changelog entries (3 control-panel slices, test-alignment, context-gate+codex, docs); 4 memory decisions (control-plane API contextRoot/strict-pick/cache-only, catalog.ts extraction keeps @inquirer out of server bundle, vault registry design, Tauri spawn-Node+WebviewUrl::External hosting); soul priority → v0.6.0; user.md version → 0.5.1/0.6.0-dev; tech_stack updated. sleep-tasks: epic v06-control-panel-vaults-tauri todo→in_progress with real 5-node tracker; reconciled 4 placeholder task bodies; 3 slice flowcharts sync-clean (backend 11/11, frontend 7/7, tauri A1-A6 done + A7/A8 manual); flagged 5 stale older todos. sleep-product: new feature control-panel.md (18 ACs); updated web-dashboard + manifest-based-install-update PRDs; 3 new knowledge files (control-plane-api, tauri-desktop-hosting, vault-registry-multivault) + extended three-reviewer-parallel-mandates with the v0.6 case study. All v0.6 slice tasks in_review awaiting user verification; Tauri launch/sign/notarize is manual handoff. Marketing rem-sleep clean. Pre-existing marketing-council test flake tracked.
